Desc_EN: You are just starting your journey. There’s a lot to learn, but this is the first step.
Desc_Native: ጉዞህን አሁን ትጀምራለህ። ለመማር ብዙ ነገር አለ፣ ይህ ግን የመጀመሪያ እርምጃ ነው።

Desc_EN: You have some basic understanding, but there is still room to grow. Keep going.
Desc_Native: መሠረታዊ ግንዛቤ አለህ፣ ነገር ግን ለመሻሻል ቦታ አለ። ቀጥል።

Desc_EN: You understand quite a bit and are improving steadily. A little more effort will take you further.
Desc_Native: ብዙ ነገር ታውቃለህ እና በቀስታ ታሻሻለህ። ትንሽ ተጨማሪ ጥረት ይፈልጋል።

Desc_EN: You have solid knowledge and can handle most questions confidently.
Desc_Native: ጠንካራ እውቀት አለህ እና አብዛኛዎቹን ጥያቄዎች በመተማመን ትመልሳለህ።

Desc_EN: You are very knowledgeable and only a few challenges remain.
Desc_Native: እጅግ ብዙ ነገር ታውቃለህ፣ ጥቂት ብቻ ነገሮች ቀርተዋል።

Desc_EN: You have deep understanding and perform at a high level consistently.
Desc_Native: ጥልቅ እውቀት አለህ እና በከፍተኛ ደረጃ ትሰራለህ።

Desc_EN: You are among the best. Your knowledge and thinking are exceptional.
Desc_Native: ከምርጦች መካከል ነህ። እውቀትህና አስተሳሰብህ እጅግ ይልቃል።

Desc_EN: You reached the highest level. Exceptional knowledge and understanding.
Desc_Native: ከፍተኛውን ደረጃ ደርሰሃል። እጅግ የላቀ እውቀት አለህ።
